scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.docker:run: docker run -d --name routerhub --restart unless-stopped -p 3001:3001 --env-file .env -v routerhub-data:/app/data routerhub
scripts.docker:stop: docker stop routerhub && docker rm routerhub
scripts.docker:restart: npm run docker:stop && npm run docker:run
